articles.title: Germany's grid fees and inertia payments highlight contrasts in energy storage regulation (德國)
keyPoints: 德國聯邦網路局(BNetzA)考慮對大型儲能項目收取電網使用費，可能阻礙市場增長
投資者無法將電網費用成本和風險納入決策，導致市場不確定性
德國儲能預計從目前的2.8GW快速增長至2037年的68GW/135GWh
同時，德國推出獨特的慣性支付機制(Momentanreserve)，提供10年長期合約收入
慣性服務是電網頻率穩定的關鍵，儲能是少數能有效提供的技術
此機制提高技術門檻，有助於推動對電網友好的儲能部署
articles.originalContent: Fluence has seen a shift in project durations from around 2-hour on average to 4-hour. The BNetzA itself anticipates large-scale energy storage deployments to rapidly grow from around 2.8GW today to 68GW/135GWh by 2037. Germany’s four transmission system operators are offering fixed payments for the new non-frequency ancillary service, called 'Momentanreserve' ('Instantaneous Reserve').

articles.title: First Solar, Oxford PV ink US perovskite patent licensing deal (美國)
keyPoints: First Solar與英國Oxford PV簽署鈣鈦礦太陽能專利許可協議
許可證使First Solar能繼續追求薄膜鈣鈦礦產品的製造和商業化
First Solar已投資20億美元進行薄膜研發，包括鈣鈦礦項目
Oxford PV於2024年9月向美國客戶交付首批商業化鈣鈦礦串聯太陽能模組
此前Oxford PV已與中國天合光能簽署中國市場的專利許可協議
鈣鈦礦可吸收更寬範圍的光譜，理論上可大幅提升太陽能模組效率
鈣鈦礦量產挑戰在於材料暴露在光、熱、濕氣下會快速降解
articles.originalContent: First Solar CEO Mark Widmar said the license would allow the firm to 'continue pursuing viable pathways to manufacturing and commercialising thin film-perovskite products.' Oxford PV has emerged as one of the foremost companies in the silicon-perovskite tandem solar industry.

articles.title: Atlas Renewable Energy secures US$3 billion for Latin American solar-plus-storage projects (拉丁美洲)
keyPoints: Atlas Renewable Energy完成拉丁美洲最大規模的非傳統再生能源企業再融資
融資總額30億美元，投資者包括Global Infrastructure Partners和多家國際銀行
資金將支持智利超過1GW太陽能及200MW/800MWh儲能項目
智利有六個項目，其中兩個為太陽能儲能共建項目正在建設中
還包括巴西546MW和墨西哥429MW太陽能項目，共計10個項目
智利的BESS del Desierto為800MWh大型獨立儲能項目，已於去年開始運營
此融資顯示全球金融機構對該公司品牌和區域策略的信心
articles.originalContent: US independent power producer (IPP) Atlas Renewable Energy has secured refinancing of US$3 billion for a solar and battery energy storage system (BESS) portfolio in Latin America. The company described the deal as the 'largest corporate refinancing for non-conventional renewable energy' in the region.

articles.title: Energy storage co-location with solar PV not a 'silver bullet' (全球)
keyPoints: 專家警告共置儲能並非拯救表現不佳太陽能資產的萬靈丹
LCP Delta顧問認為共置被過度炒作，獨立儲能對系統更重要
獨立儲能提供上下行頻率調節，是技術上最好的選擇
太陽能資產若需依賴儲能才能獲利，該太陽能本身可能已經是問題資產
共置項目在合約、計量和收益分配上面臨複雜挑戰
在電網飽和、連接點不足的南歐國家，共置可能是唯一選項
articles.originalContent: Co-location has a place, but I think it's quite overhyped by a lot of people. From a system perspective, standalone storage is the most important because it provides the up and down frequency regulation. If you have a solar asset which is eating a lot of negative prices, you're better off having a standalone battery as a hedge.
